instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that defines a reusable macro `renderProductList` accepting a sequence of product maps (fields: name, price, inStock). The macro renders an unordered list; out-of-stock items show a strikethrough name and "(unavailable)" suffix. Escape all user-facing text. Include a short comment documenting the expected model shape.
code:
<#-- Model: products: sequence of maps { name: string, price: number, inStock: boolean } --> <#macro renderProductList products> <#if !products?has_content>

No products available.

<#else>
    <#list products as product>
  • <#if product.inStock!false> ${product.name?html} ${product.price?string.currency} <#else> ${product.name?html} (unavailable) ${product.price?string.currency}

metadata.author: pipeline-operator
metadata.notes: Quality anchor — do not delete; use as few-shot template
